candidates.SQL: SELECT T2.city, T2.zip_code, T1.area_code FROM area_code AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_data AS T2 ON T1.zip_code = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.median_age >= 40 LIMIT 10

candidates.evidence: Chain-of-Thought: First identify relevant zip codes, then calculate the result using a subquery. (Approach: Subquery, Variant 1)
candidates.SQL: SELECT T2.city, T2.zip_code, T1.area_code FROM area_code AS T1 WHERE zip_code IN (SELECT zip_code FROM zip_data AS T2 ON T1.zip_code = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.median_age >= 40 LIMIT 10
